title: How to reset your Gmail password
description: A simple guide to recover or change your Gmail password.

steps.title: Open the sign-in page
steps.body: Go to the Google sign-in page in your browser.

steps.title: Click Forgot Password
steps.body: Tap the blue 'Forgot password?' link below the password entry box.

steps.title: Receive verification code
steps.body: Google will send a 6-digit verification code to your recovery email or phone number. Check your phone/inbox and type it on the screen.

steps.title: Create a new password
steps.body: Type a strong, new password that you haven't used before. Write it down in a safe place.

glossary.definition: A backup email address used to verify identity and get back into your account.
A temporary short number sent to your phone or backup email to prove you own the account.
